name: Boolean
comment:
Boolean data type has two possible truth values to represent logic.

@docs xor, eqv, imp, parse

values.name: eqv
values.comment:
Check if antecedent ⇔ consequent (x ⇔ y).

    -- x: antecedent
    -- y: consequent
    eqv False False == True
    eqv True True   == True
    eqv False True  == False
    eqv True False  == False

values.name: imp
values.comment:
Check if antecedent ⇒ consequent (x ⇒ y).

    -- x: antecedent
    -- y: consequent
    imp False False == True
    imp False True  == True
    imp True True   == True
    imp True False  == False

values.name: parse
values.comment:
Convert string to boolean.

    -- s: a string
    parse "not true" == False
    parse "inactive" == False
    parse "not off"  == True
    parse "truthy"   == True

values.name: xor
values.comment:
Get exclusive-or of 2 boolean values.

    -- x: first
    -- y: second
    xor True True  == False
    xor True False == True
